title: Patent (Pending) - A Multi-Modal Surveillance System
subtitle: Indian Patent Application No. 202521020743 · Filed Mar 2025 · Co-Author
description: Filed a patent for a multi-modal surveillance system fusing a Vision Transformer (400M params, 27 layers) with an NLP model (1.7B params, 28 layers) for real-time traffic analysis. Scored 92/100 on COCO/BDD100K benchmarks and edge-deployed with ~2-hour battery life on consumer hardware. (Indian App No. 202521020743, SSR Ref. 402645.)

title: Top 3 Runner-Up - AB PM-JAY Healthcare Hackathon
subtitle: NHA × IISc Bangalore · Clinical Document Classification & STG Compliance
description: Built an automated Ayushman Bharat claim adjudication pipeline: Gemma 3 12B VLM (dual pass per page for OCR/classification + clinical checks), negation-aware keyword fusion, and package-specific STG rule engines for four PM-JAY codes. Handled blurry multilingual scans, 20+ overlapping doc types, and false positives from phrases like "denies fever." Achieved ~0.77 F1 on the live evaluator; ₹3L prize; pitched live to NHA leadership. Team: Khushi Singh, Ronit Raj, Murtuza Shaikh (IIIT Gwalior).

title: 4th Place - Monad Blitz New Delhi
subtitle: Consumer AI Agent Track
description: Built ZeroKeyCLI - AdSense for the terminal. Watch a 5-second ASCII ad, earn $0.001 USDC on Monad, get a free AI coding response. Two x402 micropayment transactions settle on-chain before the ad finishes. No wallet setup, no subscription, no gas fees.

title: Winner - LNMHacks 8.0
subtitle: Blockchain Monad Hackathon
description: Developed competitive typing game on Monad blockchain with PvP staking mechanics. Players compete in 1-minute duels where speed and accuracy determine winners

title: 2nd Place - Trillion Dollar GenAI Hackathon
subtitle: IIT Bhubaneswar
description: Won Overall 2nd Position and 4 awards (Best Innovative Use Case, Best Technical Implementation, Best Presentation) for LegalEase - AI-powered legal compliance automation system addressing GST filing challenges in India

title: HackHazards '25 Winner
subtitle: Blockchain Hackathon
description: AI-Powered CRISPR Intelligence Platform. Came first out of 800+ projects.

title: Best Startup Pitch - AICTE IDE 2025
subtitle: Garudex Labs · MoE Innovation Cell · ABV-IIITM Gwalior
description: National finalist at AICTE Innovation, Design & Entrepreneurship (IDE), selected among top startups in India. Won Best Startup Pitch at the 5-day IDE program (Feb 17–21) with mentorship from industry founders and MoE's Innovation Cell. Co-founder of Garudex Labs.

title: Winner - CrftHQ Hackathon
subtitle: iONIA · Anti-Incubator Accelerator
description: Won the CrftHQ hackathon and was selected into its anti-incubator program for building an AI-powered exam platform with adaptive learning. Pitched to angel investors as part of the program.

title: Smart India Hackathon Winner
subtitle: PS1604 RAG-MLLM
description: SHAKTI-2B (fine-tuned mPLUG-Owl3) for military intelligence - VQAv2 80.1, POPE 87.4, NextQA 73.6, NLVR2 85.6; OCR 95%/65%; runs offline. PS1604.

title: Special Mention - AMD AI RL Hackathon
subtitle: IIT Delhi · Track 2: Deep RL for Minesweeper
description: Built AlphaQ - a GRPO-trained RL agent on Qwen2.5-14B to play Minesweeper on grids up to 50×50. Phase-stratified training across 6 difficulty levels on AMD Instinct MI300X (192GB HBM3). Recognised by AMD team for sophisticated technical implementation.

title: Speaker - Open Source Summit India 2026
subtitle: Linux Foundation · Mumbai · 40-Minute Session
description: Official acceptance from The Linux Foundation Events Team for OSS India 2026 (16–17 June, Jio World Convention Centre, Mumbai). Session: "Governing the Ungovernable: Security and Compliance for AI Agents in Open Source Projects" - originally submitted as a lightning talk and upgraded to a full 40-minute breakout by the program committee for deeper technical coverage and audience Q&A.

title: OSS Maintainer - GitMesh
subtitle: Linux Foundation Decentralized Trust · Agent Governance
description: Core Maintainer on GitMesh: open-source platform for governed AI agents in OSS projects (Linux Foundation Decentralized Trust). OPA policy-as-code for agent actions via MCP, GitHub/GitLab sync, audit logging, maintainer approvals, and multi-agent orchestration. Helped grow the project to 140+ GitHub stars.

title: ANRF AISEHack Phase 2 - Team Vega
subtitle: Pollution Forecasting (IIT Delhi) · Finalists at IIIT Hyderabad
description: Built an episode-aware PM2.5 forecasting pipeline for India using WRF-Chem gridded data (10-hour lookback -> 16-hour forecasts). Team Vega recorded a 0.8384 leaderboard score and qualified for finals at IIIT Hyderabad.

title: Shortlisted - CSIC 1.0 Stage III (DSCI)
subtitle: Privacy-Preserving KYC · Cryptography Track · Top 50 Nationwide
description: Submission "Privacy Preserving KYC Verification System" (Aadhaar-Zero) shortlisted among the top teams nationwide for Stage III Prototype Development under DSCI's Cyber Security Innovation Challenge (CSIC) 1.0, after technical evaluation on feasibility, originality, and impact. Building the functional prototype: ZK selective disclosure, Groth16 age proofs, AI liveness/document checks, DPDP-aligned on-chain consent/revocation, and six contracts on Base Sepolia. Top 20 teams advance to the Grand Finale with a ₹50,000 maturation grant.

title: META HUGGING FACE RL Hackathon Finalist
subtitle: OpenEnv · Quantum Error Correction
description: Built an OpenEnv RL environment training Qwen2.5-3B to decode surface-code syndromes with Stim-verified rewards. Reached 96.4% logical correction on L2_target after SFT+GRPO on Colab T4; deployed HF Space and Hub LoRA weights.

title: PARAM Production Pilot - ABV-IIITM Gwalior
subtitle: C3iHub, IIT Kanpur · Blockchain Academic Credentials
description: Shipped PARAM during a Software Engineer internship at C3iHub, IIT Kanpur — a blockchain academic credential platform for ABV-IIITM Gwalior. Live pilot across 6 departments and 6 degree programs on AWS EC2 (GitHub Actions CI). Covers semester transcripts and degree certificates (CSV bulk upload → DRAFT → REVIEWED → APPROVED → ISSUED), ERC-721 mint on Base Sepolia with document-hash anchoring, and public verification (share links, QR, API). Stack: Next.js 16 + Express 5 + BullMQ worker + Supabase Postgres; 37 Prisma models; 100+ automated tests (Vitest, Foundry, Playwright).
